g.text: clone() Stack Layout for PID Namespace
EINVAL | Stack not aligned / invalid flags
SIGSEGV | Passed stack_bottom instead of top
pid_t pid = clone(child_fn, stack_top, fl, NULL);

div.p: CRITICAL: Overflow Risk Passing the BOTTOM (stack) instead of TOP:

ol.li: Leads to immediate crash or CVE

div.p: PUSH decrements RSP POP increments RSP
Pass stack_top to clone() clone(fn, stack_top, ...)
